title: Zillow Home Value and Home Sales Forecast April 2026
text: Zillow 2026 Housing Market Forecast and Outlook. Home Value Projections: Zillow's April 2026 forecast projects that home values will remain relatively flat, with the typical U.S. home value estimated at $365,795 by end of 2026. Home value growth is expected at approximately 1.9% annually. Home Sales Forecast: Zillow projects 4.26 million existing home sales in 2026, representing a 4.3% increase over 2025. This increase suggests improving affordability is beginning to bring buyers back to the market. Market Dynamics: New Listings Growth: New listings totaled more than 426,000 in April 2026, up 2.1% from a year earlier. Active Inventory: Rose 3.7% from last April, with total homes for sale at approximately 1.3 million nationwide. Market Conditions: The housing market is characterized by more inventory and measured buyer demand, contrasting with pandemic-era conditions. Affordability Outlook: Monthly mortgage payment on a typical home is $1,829 (assuming 20% down payment, excluding taxes and insurance), down 3.4% from a year earlier. Mortgage Rate Outlook: Rates unlikely to fall below 6% in 2026. Rental Market: Multifamily rents projected to rise just 0.3% in 2026, giving incomes a chance to catch up.
